messages.content: mas de 80 caracteres, en ingles, genera 5 frases para decirle a un hombre que quieres pedirle perdon

1. I'm sorry for my behavior and I want to apologize to you.
2. I know I was wrong and I want to make things right.
3. Please forgive me for hurting you, I never meant to.
4. Let me make it up to you and show you how much I care.
5. I understand if you need time, but please know that I am truly sorry.
igual pero con mas de 80 caracteres en cada enunciado.

1. There are no words to express how sorry I am for my actions, but I want to take the first step to make amends by apologizing to you and asking for your forgiveness. 

2. I understand that my behavior was unacceptable and I regret causing you pain. I want to make things right and earn back your trust. 

3. I want to acknowledge the hurt and disappointment that I caused you and take responsibility for my actions. Please know that I am truly sorry and I will do everything I can to repair the damage I have done. 

4. I hope you can find it in your heart to forgive me for the mistakes I have made. I am committed to showing you how deeply I care about you and making things right between us. 

5. I understand that I have let you down and I want to take the necessary steps to make things right between us. Please give me the opportunity to make amends and show you how much you mean to me.

1. I feel ashamed of my behavior, and I want to apologize to you for the hurt I caused. I am committed to doing better and earning your forgiveness.

2. I understand that my actions were hurtful and I take full responsibility for my behavior. Please know that I am truly sorry for my actions, and I am committed to making things right.

3. I am sorry for the pain that my actions have caused you. I hope you can find it in your heart to forgive me and allow me the chance to make amends.

4. Please don't give up on me. I know I have made a mistake, but I am willing to put in the work to make things right. Please forgive me.

5. I understand that words alone cannot erase the hurt that I caused, but please know that I am willing to do what it takes to make things right between us.

6. I know that I have betrayed your trust, and for that, I am deeply sorry. Please give me the opportunity to make things right between us.

7. I am sorry for the pain that my actions have caused. I want to work together to heal our relationship and move forward.

8. I take full responsibility for my behavior, and I am willing to do what it takes to earn your forgiveness. Please give me the chance to prove myself to you.

9. I am deeply regretful for my actions and the pain that I have caused you. I am committed to making things right and earning your forgiveness.

10. I am sorry for my behavior and the way it made you feel. Please know that I am committed to making things right between us and healing our relationship.

1. I am truly sorry for how I treated you. I understand that I was wrong, and I hope that you can find it in your heart to forgive me.

2. I realize that my behavior was hurtful, and I am deeply sorry for the consequences of my actions. I want to do everything in my power to make things right.

3. I am sorry for the damage that I have caused. I want to show you how much you mean to me, and earn back your trust and respect.

4. I know that I let you down, and for that, I am deeply sorry. I am committed to being better and making things right between us.

5. I understand the gravity of my mistake and the impact it has had on you. Please know that I am truly sorry for what I have done, and I will work hard to make it up to you.

6. I want to acknowledge my mistake and apologize for my behavior. I hope that we can put this behind us and move forward together.

7. My actions were wrong, and I am sorry for the hurt I caused you. Please let me make it up to you in any way that I can.

8. I regret the pain that I have caused you and the damage to our relationship. I am committed to taking responsibility for my actions and working towards reconciliation.

9. I am sorry for the way I treated you and the pain that I caused. Please let me take the first step towards making things right.

10. I hope that you can forgive me for what I have done. I understand that it will take time to rebuild trust, but I am willing to do whatever it takes.

1. I am sorry for the pain my actions have caused. I want to learn from this experience and be a better partner to you.

2. I realize my behavior was unacceptable, and I am truly sorry for the hurt I have caused. I hope that we can work together to move forward.

3. I understand that my words and actions were hurtful, and for that, I am deeply sorry. Please let me show you how much I care about you by making things right.

4. I want to take responsibility for my mistakes and make amends with you. I hope you can find it in your heart to forgive me and give me a chance to make things right.

5. I am sorry for my lack of respect and consideration towards you. I want to make it up to you and earn your trust and respect back.

6. I understand that my behavior has hurt you deeply, and I am sorry for that. Please let me show you how much I care by making things right.

7. I know I have to earn your forgiveness, and I am willing to put in the work to do so. Please give me a chance to show you that I am committed to making things right between us.

8. I want to apologize for my actions and the hurt they caused you. I hope that we can work together to heal the hurt that has been caused and rebuild our relationship.

9. I understand that my behavior has put a strain on our relationship, and for that, I am deeply sorry. Let's work together to repair the damage and move forward.

10. I know that there is no excuse for what I did, and I am sorry for the pain I have caused you. Please allow me to take responsibility for my actions and make amends.

1. I understand that my behavior was unacceptable and caused you pain. I want to take responsibility for my actions and show you how committed I am to making things right between us.

2. I am sorry for my mistakes and the negative impact they have had on you and our relationship. I want to do everything I can to make it up to you.

3. My actions were thoughtless and unkind, and for that, I am truly sorry. I want to make amends and prove to you that I can be a better partner.

4. I hope that my apology can be the beginning of a fresh start for us. I want to work together towards rebuilding our relationship and moving forward.

5. I know I have made a mistake, but please know that my love for you is true. I am sorry for my behavior and am willing to do whatever it takes to make it right.

6. I want to take ownership of my actions and make things right between us. I understand that trust may take time to rebuild, but I am committed to working towards it.

7. I am truly sorry for the way I have treated you, and I want to work hard to regain your trust and respect. I hope that you can give me a chance to show you.

8. I am sorry for the hurt I caused and for not being the partner that you deserved. Let me prove to you that I can be better and make things right.

9. I understand that my actions were not acceptable, and I want to apologize and work towards making things right between us.

10. I hope my apology can be the first step towards healing the hurt caused by my actions. Please let me show you how sorry I am and how much I want to make it right.

1. I know that I have caused you pain and discomfort, and I am deeply sorry for that. Please allow me to show you how committed I am to making things better between us.

2. I want to apologize for my actions and take responsibility for the hurt I caused. I hope that we can work together towards a brighter future.

3. I understand that regaining your trust may take time, but please know that I am fully committed to working towards it. I am sorry for the mistakes I have made.

4. I want to make amends and show you how much you mean to me. I am sorry for the way I have treated you, and I hope that you can give me a chance to make it right.

5. I realize that I have a lot to do in order to make things right between us. Please let me show you how committed I am to earning your forgiveness and making things better between us.

6. I am ashamed of my behavior, and I am sorry for the hurt I have caused you. Please let me show you how committed I am to making things better between us.

7. I want to make up for my actions and show you how much I care about you. Please let me show you that I am willing to do whatever it takes to make things right.

8. I know that I have caused damage to our relationship, and I am sorry for that. Please let me make it up to you and show you that I am truly sorry for my mistakes.

9. I am committed to working hard towards making things right between us. Please allow me the opportunity to show you how much I care and strengthen our relationship.

10. I understand that my actions were hurtful, and I am sorry for the negative impact they had on you and our relationship. I hope that we can work together towards healing and moving forward.

1. Please accept my sincere apologies for my mistakes. I hope that I can prove to you that I am capable of being a better partner.

2. I want to acknowledge my faults and make up for the hurt that I have caused you. Please give me a chance to show you how much I care about you.

3. I am sorry for any stress or disappointment that I have caused in our relationship. Your forgiveness would mean the world to me.

4. I fully understand the gravity of my actions, and I am committed to making things right. I hope that we can work together towards a positive future.

5. I want to express my remorse for my behavior and reassure you that I am fully committed to making things better between us.

6. My apologies may not be enough to erase the pain I caused, but please know that I am here to listen, understand and make up for my mistakes.

7. I am sorry for the harm that I have caused you and hope that we can find a way to heal and move forward together.

8. I understand that forgiveness may not come easy, but please know that I am willing to do whatever it takes to make things right between us.

9. I am sorry for any misunderstandings, frustrations, or pain I have caused. I hope that we can work together towards reconciliation and peace.

10. I am truly sorry for my actions, and I vow to learn from my mistakes. Please give me the opportunity to prove that I can be a better partner to you.

1. I want to express my deepest apologies for my actions that caused you pain. It was never my intention to bring you any harm, and I would do anything to make things right.

2. Please allow me to take responsibility for my mistakes and make amends. I hope that we can work towards rebuilding trust and a stronger bond.

3. I am sorry for my behavior and the pain it has caused you. I want to learn from this and become a better partner for you.

4. I know that apologies alone will not make up for what I have done, but please know that I am fully committed to making things right, and I hope that you can see that through my actions.

5. I am sorry for the mistakes that I have made. I hope that we can work together and move forward towards a brighter future.

6. I want to express how sorry I am for my mistakes, and I am willing to do anything it takes to earn back your trust.

7. Please accept my apologies for my unkind words and actions. I hope that we can work together towards healing and strengthening our relationship.

8. I apologize for causing distrust and discomfort in our relationship. I hope that we can move past this and create a brighter future together.

9. I am sorry for my behavior, and I hope that you can forgive me. I want to learn from my mistakes and show you that I am committed to being a better partner.

10. Please know that my apologies come from a place of sincerity and a desire to make things right. I hope that we can work together to build a stronger relationship.
